name: Adobe Analytics / Experience Cloud data collection
description: Legacy AppMeasurement, AEP Web SDK (alloy.js), edge domains, and regional collection hosts.
methodology: Correlate report suite IDs, org IDs, and datastream IDs. Distinguish first-party CNAME collectors from Adobe edge (*.adobedc.net). Validate consent and AEP Identity namespaces. Org-specific: add your vanity collector hostname (e.g. smetrics.company.com) as extra patterns.
